query_normalized: the effect of sensory deprivation on dream recall and bizarreness psychology
rationale: The paper investigates the relationship between affect (valence/arousal) and dream structure/content, but it does not measure or discuss "sensory deprivation" as an independent variable or experimental condition. While it addresses the dependent variables (dream structure/bizarreness proxies), it fails to satisfy the criteria for the specific mechanism (sensory deprivation) or the empirical population (sensory-deprived individuals) required for inclusion under rules (a), (b), or (e).
